Class GTNetConfigResource

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<GTNetConfig>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreate<GTNetConfig>
grafiosch.rest.GTNetConfigResource
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/gtnetconfig") public class GTNetConfigResource extends UpdateCreate<GTNetConfig>
REST controller for managing GTNetConfig. Only update of the connectionTimeout field is supported - the entity itself is created during the handshake process. Only administrators can edit GTNetConfig.

      getUpdateCreateJpaRepository in class UpdateCreate<GTNetConfig>

    • update

      @PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')") @PutMapping(produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GTNetConfig> update(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid GTNetConfig entity) throws Exception
      Updates a GTNetConfig. Only connectionTimeout can be modified by the user. Restricted to administrators only.
      Overrides:
      update in class UpdateCreate<GTNetConfig>
      Throws:
      Exception
